diagrams.title: Relationship Between Linear Independence, Span and Basis

nodes.label: Form matrix with vectors as columns

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Linear Independence and Span</text>

  <!-- Basis Vectors -->
  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="150" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="125" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    v₁
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="100" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="90" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    v₂
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Span Grid -->
  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="250" y2="150" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="100" y2="250" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="150" y1="150" x2="150" y2="250" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="200" y1="150" x2="200" y2="250" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="250" y1="150" x2="250" y2="250" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="100" y1="100" x2="250" y2="100" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="100" y1="200" x2="250" y2="200" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="100" y1="250" x2="250" y2="250" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Span Label -->
  <rect x="280" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Span
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Linear Independence Label -->
  <rect x="280" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Linear Independence
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Dependent Vector -->
  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="180" y2="180" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="140" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#E91E63" opacity="0">
    w (dependent)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Independent Vector -->
  <line x1="100" y1="150" x2="220" y2="220" stroke="#4CAF50" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="160" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    u (independent)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Explanation Text -->
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Independent vectors add new dimensions to the span
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
